hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]] && [[ "$FILE" != *_pb2.py ]] && [[ "$FILE" != *_pb2_grpc.py ]] && [[ "$FILE" != *.pyi ]] && { ERR=$(python3 -m py_compile "$FILE" 2>&1); [ -n "$ERR" ] && jq -Rn --arg e "$ERR" "{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:\"PostToolUse\",additionalContext:(\"Syntax error in $FILE:\\n\" + $e)}}"; } || true'
